description: Evaluated on clarity, confidence, and structured responses.

feedback_templates.pitch_stability: Pitch variance is {value:.2f}. Interviewers respond well to a steady, grounded tone.
feedback_templates.speech_rate: Speaking rate scored {value:.2f}. Aim for 130-150 WPM to sound composed.
feedback_templates.keyword_density: Keyword relevance is {value:.2f}. Incorporate role-specific terminology.
